name: io.github.gateio-dev/gate-mcp
description: Gate API v4 MCP server — spot, futures, options, wallet, and more.

environmentVariables.name: GATE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Gate API key. Required for authenticated endpoints (trading, wallet, account).

environmentVariables.name: GATE_API_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Gate API secret. Required for authenticated endpoints (trading, wallet, account).

environmentVariables.name: GATE_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Gate API base URL. Defaults to https://api.gateio.ws. Set to https://api-testnet.gateapi.io for testnet.
